name: registration_eligibility
threshold: Registrable under EFL rules; non-UK/Irish players require an obtainable GBE outcome

name: budget_affordability
threshold: Estimated total cost must fit the approved brief budget envelope
override: new brief required for any budget expansion

name: role_relevance
threshold: Primary or secondary role must match the active brief role

name: pathway_blocking_hard
threshold: Internal player <12 months from readiness at same role and external target is same age or younger on 3+ year deal

name: wage_discipline
threshold: Estimated wage exceeds 120% of the role wage band

name: age_profile_fit
threshold: Outside archetype range or position-specific age curve tolerance

name: championship_projection_below_threshold
threshold: Championship Transition or Emerging Asset target projects below the 40th percentile base case

name: pathway_blocking_soft
threshold: Internal player 12-24 months from readiness and external target would receive a 2+ year deal
